steps.name: check-deps
steps.description: Verify t0034 and t0035 are completed.

steps.name: init-folders
steps.description: Create task folder structure and initial files.

steps.name: research-papers
steps.description: Review corpus papers on cable theory and electrotonic-length scaling.

steps.name: research-internet
steps.description: Skipped: task is a pure post-hoc analysis of existing sweep data, no new external facts required.

steps.name: research-code
steps.description: Review t0034 and t0035 trial CSVs, section biophysics in t0024 library, and any cable-theory utilities in prior tasks.

steps.name: planning
steps.description: Design the L/lambda computation and overlay-plot approach.

steps.name: implementation
steps.description: Compute L/lambda per (length, diameter) operating point; overlay primary DSI and vector-sum DSI vs L/lambda for t0034 and t0035; produce answer asset.

steps.name: creative-thinking
steps.description: Skipped: analysis is narrowly scoped (L/lambda collapse test); no out-of-the-box exploration needed.

steps.name: results
steps.description: Write results_summary, results_detailed, metrics, costs, remote_machines_used; embed collapse plot.

steps.name: suggestions
steps.description: Generate follow-up suggestions based on collapse analysis outcome.

steps.name: reporting
steps.description: Run all verificators, capture sessions, mark task.json completed, prepare for PR.
